data.title: Project Hail Mary
data.description: An astronaut wakes up with amnesia on a desperate mission to save Earth from a star-eating parasite, with the help of an unlikely alien companion.

data.title: Pídeme lo que quieras
data.description: A Spanish erotic romance film where Judith Flores's life changes after meeting her boss, Eric Zimmerman, who introduces her to a world of fantasies and eroticism.

data.title: The Sheep Detectives (Pecore sotto copertura)
data.description: A comedic mystery film where a flock of sheep, inspired by detective novels, sets out to investigate their shepherd's mysterious death.

data.title: Un bel giorno
data.description: A compelling drama that explores themes of love, loss, and second chances, set against a backdrop of emotional challenges.

data.title: Shelter
data.description: A suspenseful thriller that follows characters seeking refuge, only to find themselves in greater danger as secrets unravel.

data.title: Your Fault: London (È colpa tua: Londra)
data.description: A dramatic film exploring complex relationships and the consequences of past actions, set in the vibrant city of London.

data.title: Agata Christian - Murder on the Snow
data.description: A classic-style murder mystery set in a snowy landscape, where a detective must uncover the truth behind a perplexing crime.

data.title: Elle
data.description: A prequel series exploring Elle Woods' high school years in 1995, before she became the iconic character known for her legal pursuits.

data.title: Off Campus
data.description: A college romantic drama based on Elle Kennedy's book series, following an elite ice hockey team and the women in their lives as they navigate love, heartbreak, and self-discovery.

data.title: Every Year After (Un anno dopo l'altro)
data.description: A poignant series that chronicles the evolving lives and relationships of characters over the course of many years.

data.title: Silo
data.description: In a dystopian future, a community lives underground in a giant silo, believing the outside world is toxic, and questioning the truths they've been told.

data.title: F1 (The Movie)
data.description: A high-octane movie related to Formula 1 racing, starring Brad Pitt as a former F1 driver who comes out of retirement to mentor a young talent.

data.title: Cape Fear
data.description: A suspenseful thriller series that explores themes of obsession and revenge, keeping viewers on the edge of their seats.

data.title: Outcome
data.description: A dark comedy where a beloved Hollywood star, Reef Hawk, must confront his hidden demons and make amends after being extorted with a mysterious, image-shattering video.

data.title: Sugar
data.description: A private detective investigates the disappearance of a Hollywood producer's granddaughter in Los Angeles, uncovering dark secrets along the way.

data.title: Eternity
data.description: In an afterlife where souls have one week to decide where to spend eternity, Joan is faced with the impossible choice between her long-time husband and her first love.

data.title: Widow's Bay
data.description: A comedy horror series set in a quaint New England island town afflicted by a centuries-old curse, blending genuine horror with character-driven comedy.

data.title: The Gorge
data.description: Two elite snipers are ordered to guard a deep gorge without knowing what lies inside, eventually bonding and facing a mysterious evil that emerges from within.

data.title: Your Friends & Neighbors
data.description: A compelling drama series that explores the intricate lives and relationships of a group of friends and neighbors, revealing their secrets and struggles.

data.title: Wolfs
data.description: Two rival professional fixers, who prefer to operate as lone wolves, are forced to collaborate on a high-profile crime, leading to a chaotic and dangerous night.

data.title: I Will Find You: Limited Series
data.description: A gripping limited series that follows a complex investigation, unraveling secrets and mysteries across its episodes.

data.title: Enola Holmes 3
data.description: Enola Holmes, Sherlock's younger sister, embarks on a new international adventure, leaving Victorian London for Malta to solve her most complex and risky case yet.

data.title: Rhythm + Flow Italy: Season 3
data.description: The Italian version of the popular music competition show, where aspiring hip-hop artists compete through various challenges for a grand prize and recognition.

data.title: Succede anche nelle migliori famiglie
data.description: An Italian comedy about three adult siblings who unite to prevent their recently widowed mother from marrying her first love, a decision that throws their family into disarray.

data.title: Oasis: Season 1
data.description: A compelling drama series that explores intertwined lives and hidden truths within a unique setting, drawing viewers into its intricate narrative.

data.title: Voicemails for Isabelle
data.description: A woman coping with the death of her younger sister continues to leave voicemails on her old phone number, unaware that it has been reassigned to a stranger who gradually falls for her.

data.title: Losing Judgment: Season 1
data.description: A captivating series that delves into complex legal and personal dilemmas, as characters face difficult choices and their consequences.

data.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
data.description: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails reunite for their most epic adventure yet, facing a new formidable foe, Shadow, with powers unlike anything they've seen.

data.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Season 2
data.description: The live-action adaptation of the beloved animated series continues, following Aang and his friends as they strive to master the elements and end the Fire Nation's war.

data.title: La coda del diavolo
data.description: A thrilling and suspenseful movie that keeps audiences on the edge of their seats with its intricate plot and unexpected twists.

data.title: House of the Dragon
data.description: A prequel to Game of Thrones, this fantasy drama focuses on the Targaryen civil war for the Iron Throne, set centuries before the original series.

data.title: The Rookie
data.description: A man in his forties pursues his lifelong dream of becoming an LAPD officer, facing challenges from younger colleagues and the demanding nature of the job.

data.title: Ted
data.description: A prequel series to the Ted movies, following a teenage John Bennett and his foul-mouthed, sentient teddy bear in 1993.

data.title: A Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms
data.description: A Game of Thrones spin-off based on George R. R. Martin's novellas, set a century before the events of Game of Thrones, following the adventures of Ser Duncan the Tall and his squire Egg.

data.title: FROM.
data.description: Residents of a mysterious town are trapped and must find a way out while surviving terrifying nocturnal creatures and uncovering the secrets of their predicament.

data.title: The Day of the Jackal
data.description: A contemporary reimagining of the classic thriller about an unrivaled and elusive assassin, the Jackal, and the tenacious intelligence officer hunting him across Europe.

data.title: Gangs of London
data.description: A visceral crime drama exploring the power struggles of London's criminal underworld after the assassination of its most powerful crime boss, leading to chaos and revenge.

data.title: Euphoria
data.description: A drama series following a group of high school students as they navigate complex issues of identity, trauma, drugs, sex, and love in a modern world.

data.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
data.description: A spin-off of The Walking Dead, following Maggie and Negan as they navigate a post-apocalyptic New York City, facing new threats and old demons.

data.title: Money Road
data.description: A gripping drama series that delves into the high-stakes world of finance and crime, where ambition and danger intertwine.
